narrative:
Cols 75-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,719 registered voters, with 68.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
